svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="保障层" id="layers1"> <mxGraphModel dx="-549" dy="-125" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="480" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="AI 保障的五层骨架" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="300" x="400" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="① 评审回路
独立 Agent 分桶审查 + 收敛循环
解决：写代码和审代码盲区重叠" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="310" x="30" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="② 契约闸
pre-commit 四层跨层扫描
解决：改了一层忘了同步另一层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="310" x="370" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="③ 测试门禁
UT/IT/E2E + verify 强制
解决：编译过但行为被静默删除" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="310" x="710" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="④ 规范固化
规则前置 + 技能 + 危险命令 hook
解决：AI 不知道项目红线" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="310" x="200" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;fontStyle=1;" value="⑤ ArchUnit 架构守护
架构规则写成测试 + freeze 基线
解决：AI 架构越界(数据层直连SQL/定时任务调TenantContext)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="360" x="540" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cap" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="每层兜住其它层的盲区 — 少一层 AI 就多一个逃逸口子" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="600" x="250" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="principle" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f1f5f9;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="设计原则：① 分层不靠单道 ② 机器执行不靠人记 ③ 可验证不是黑话" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="800" x="150" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 520px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 308px; height: 1px; padding-top: 90px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
① 评审回路
独立 Agent 分桶审查 + 收敛循环
解决：写代码和审代码盲区重叠

div.div:
③ 测试门禁
UT/IT/E2E + verify 强制
解决：编译过但行为被静默删除

div.div:
④ 规范固化
规则前置 + 技能 + 危险命令 hook
解决：AI 不知道项目红线

div.div:
⑤ ArchUnit 架构守护
架构规则写成测试 + freeze 基线
解决：AI 架构越界(数据层直连SQL/定时任务调TenantContext)

div.div: 每层兜住其它层的盲区 — 少一层 AI 就多一个逃逸口子
